subcodes.first_line: O thou lover of the All-Glorious Beauty! These sorrows and griefs, these yearnings and lamentations, these trials and tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عاشق جمال ذی الجلال این احزان و اشجان و حسرت و اندوه و بلایا و رزایاء
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
